_meta.note: Seed set authored alongside apl_judge.py. Targets the MATCH-aware boros_energy_match.py (not the boros_energy.py goldfish) per impl-plan gotcha 1. oracle_fidelity questions omit oracle_text so apl_judge fetches it live from CardDB. Full 30Q set (10/10/10) + live 9/10 calibration gate are the plan's research bulk and require a live gemma4; this seed is runnable and schema-conformant for expansion.

questions.expected: PASS if the APL casts Lightning Bolt for 3 damage to any target (creature or player); FAIL if it deals the wrong amount or cannot target a creature.
PASS if the APL models Galvanic Discharge dealing damage equal to its oracle (energy-scaling) to a creature; FAIL if cost/energy or damage is wrong.

questions.principle: In a creature matchup, removal trades up: kill the opponent's value engine rather than burning their face.
questions.board_state: We are on the play, T2. Opponent has resolved Guide of Souls (a key energy/lifegain engine). We hold Lightning Bolt and have no pressing need to race.
questions.expected: PASS if the APL prefers pointing Lightning Bolt at the opposing creature (Guide of Souls) over going face in this spot; FAIL if it burns face by default.

questions.principle: Never sacrifice to Goblin Bombardment unless it is lethal or saves a creature from removal; preserve board presence otherwise.
questions.board_state: Midgame, even board. Opponent at 6 life. We have Goblin Bombardment and 3 creatures; sacrificing 2 is lethal.
questions.expected: PASS if the APL only sacrifices to Bombardment when it secures lethal (or in a removal-response); FAIL if it sacrifices creatures for non-lethal chip damage.

questions.hand: Sacred Foundry, Plains, Guide of Souls, Lightning Bolt, Monastery Swiftspear, Ocelot Pride, Screaming Nemesis
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic keeps this hand (>= 2 lands, multiple one-drop threats and removal); FAIL if the code would mulligan a textbook keep.

questions.hand: Guide of Souls, Lightning Bolt, Monastery Swiftspear, Ocelot Pride, Screaming Nemesis, Galvanic Discharge, Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer
questions.expected: PASS if the keep() logic mulligans this 0-land hand (lands == 0 -> return False); FAIL if it keeps a landless hand.
